title: ADR-0014: Knowledge store engine = Turbopuffer (namespace-per-tenant)
verdict_summary: Canonical ratified ADR. It is a decision record whose build obligations delegate wholly to the orvex-studio-knowledge module (PRD dCbFzRQGDr / arch azRwTCZMqw), which has a full breakdown at feature-map lines 342-413. Every mandated build item is covered: (1) Turbopuffer-sole adapter at internal/store/turbopuffer/ + conformance seam (fm 353/354); (2) namespace-per-tenant provisioning (fm 354/380/413); (3) the REQUIRED cross-tenant/intra-tenant-restricted bytes=0 isolation probe FR-K31b (fm 365 'Isolation probes: cross-tenant + intra-tenant-restricted zero-byte + count-oracle in CI & per-deploy', fm 515 P8 probes; FR-K31b present in covers-union); (4) ENG-1358 duplicate-detection re-platformed onto Turbopuffer, not pgvector (fm 357 /v1/duplicates, fm 501 duplicate & merge sweep, fm 720 0.98-cosine dedup); (5) knowledge NFR baseline (fm 360 query latency budgets + QoS fairness, fm 154 NFR conformance harness). Key management via OpenBao/External Secrets is infra/definition-phase (pack-covered). No BUILD obligation is left without a story. Zero gaps.

components.name: internal/store/turbopuffer/ adapter seam (vendor-neutral store seam kept as hygiene)
components.quote: the vendor-neutral adapter seam (`internal/store/turbopuffer/`) is kept as hygiene, not a second live store.

components.name: Turbopuffer namespace-per-tenant knowledge store (sole engine)
components.quote: Turbopuffer is the sole knowledge store engine. ... Each tenant gets its own Turbopuffer namespace; cross-tenant isolation is structural (separate namespaces).

components.name: Cross-tenant isolation probe (bytes=0 M5 gate, FR-K31b)
components.quote: Cross-tenant isolation probe is REQUIRED — the top M5 gate. E2E cross-tenant bytes = 0 AND intra-tenant restricted-page bytes = 0 (the ACL ∩ token-scope egress chokepoint, FR-K31b).
